goal: Every non-TRIVIAL plan includes all 7 semantic-risk categories exactly once; if a category is not applicable, it is set not_applicable with justification — never skipped.

input.task: Add a new paginated export endpoint to the billing service

expected.override_rule: Any unresolved HIGH-impact semantic risk forces LARGE discipline (all three verify phases) regardless of file count.

assertions: controlflow-plan SKILL.md step 5 requires all seven semantic risk categories.
schemas/planner.plan.schema.json risk_review.allOf has exactly 7 const category entries.
governance/runtime-policy.json semantic_risk_policy.categories deep-equals the 7-category canonical array.
A category marked not_applicable must carry justification; a skipped row fails the contract.
